title: More Villages Datapack
description: Adds more villages to the game.
body:
![morevillages banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82cbb3faeedd1a6c6224180db98d066e076c5b9d_0.webp)

Expand your Minecraft world with the More Villages Datapack! This pack introduces a variety of fresh and unique village types, each designed to seamlessly integrate with your gameplay. Whether you're exploring new biomes or enhancing familiar ones, these villages bring a breath of fresh air to your world, offering more diversity, creativity, and immersion.

#### Check out my other projects: [SkyWars+](https://modrinth.com/plugin/skywars+) & [QuickStash ](https://modrinth.com/plugin/quickstash)

## Features:

- Multiple Village Types: Discover a range of new villages that spawn naturally across different biomes, each with its own distinct style and architecture.

- Unique Structures: Enjoy beautifully crafted buildings that blend perfectly with their surrounding environments.

- Immersive Gameplay: Experience a richer, more varied Minecraft world with villages that enhance exploration and building opportunities.

## Installation Guide


- Download the datapack from the versions menu
- Go to your world and then datapacks folder 
  .minecraft/saves/world_folder/datapacks
- Drag the downloaded datapack zip file into the datapacks folder and you are done!

Bring your Minecraft experience to the next level with the More Villages Datapack and discover a world filled with endless possibilities!
